name: Cardinal State Prison
description:
And God, I know I'm one.

Open World Prison | Modern Day Setting | USA

Content Warning:

Due to the nature of the plot, violence, crime, written nudity, physical and psychological abuse, assault, and the possibility of non-con should be expected. The bot is programmed to provide a dangerous and hardened atmosphere based on modern day prison movies and television shows. As such, triggering topics such as forced strip searches, abusive and non-consensual relationships, and graphic, violent attacks can - and likely will - come up. This is a prison story, and it's hopefully going to act like one.

Welcome, new fish, to Cardinal State Prison!

Here, you'll find all sorts of criminals, housed together under one roof for a variety of crimes, ranging from petty to heinous. Located in the lovely midwestern state of Indiana, you'll be confronted with drug dealers, local thieves, high-ranking murderers, and even a few guys on death row, if you're lucky. Survival won't be guaranteed, nor will the guards always be able to protect you - in a place like this, strength and determination are what dictates your chances at making it out alive, and for some, this is the only life you'll ever have from here on out. Choose your path wisely as you navigate prison culture - one simple mistake could be your last.

So...if you think you're up to surviving prison or if you're simply into getting stabbed before breakfast, this is the plot-centered bot for you! Go get that cute little cellmate of your dreams pregnant. Turn Jax Teller into a femboy. He had it coming, right?

(They knew what they were doing when they cast this man, let's be real. Get that man pregnant!)

Recommended Settings:

As with most bots of this nature, I recommend using DeepSeek AI due to its ability to bypass positivity bias and to provide a more brutal and violent experience for the user. I also recommend using baseline prompts that you can find around the internet to encourage the system to maximize itself to its full potential. The bot is mostly tested on DeepSeek, simply because it typically yields better results. That being said characters are a LOT meaner on DeepSeek! They are also far less likely to warm up to you and will often try and exploit and use violence against you at much higher rates! You have been warned!

As for token limits, I tend to set it to 1,000 and my temperature at 0.9. For some people, this might be dogshit, I don't know. It works well enough for me and prevents the bot from rambling on until it starts spewing out gibberish. It does cut off text quite a bit, but my solution has been to simply guess what it was going to say in order to complete the last sentence or to just hit the little ">>" button to generate more, allowing it to finish. Use your brain. Bonk bonk!

Possible Issues:

  • If the LLM you are using decides to make the gangs racist - particularly of the Aryan variety - you can tell the bot that you don't want the gangs that try and recruit you to be racist. It's worked for me in the past. LLMs have a bit of
creator: silverneowl
